title: Doge Client Light
description: Doge Client Light is a seperate version of doge client that contains mostly optimisation mods.
body:
Do you like clients like Lunar Client? Well I do! I like using Lunar client but I can't use any other mods. Its annoying, thats why I made Doge Client Light. Doge Client Light is very similar to other clients like Lunar. It also has other features like the voice chat mod! It also contains mostly optimization mods. You can also add any mods you want by opening the modpack folder! Most other optimization modpacks lack feature mods that don't really affect performance but are still nice to have. Thats where Doge Client Light is different! It has Simple Voice Chat and many compatiablity mods like CIT Resewn, Entity Texture Features and more!

Please check gallery for Performance overview.

Sadly you cannot upload a modpack with optifine. Because of this Doge Client Light has Iris Shaders which works with any shaders you may use with optifine. It also has sodium for better frames! You may be wondering,

"But what about my keystrokes?!?!?" Well doge client light has Simple HUD Enhanced for that Simple HUD Enhanced has many other options for other hud changes. It is all configurable by pressing Right Shift like on other clients!
